subject: Remove unused static/src files
description:
Delete the following unused files:
- /workspace/buz_customize_kanban/static/src/product_kanban.js
- /workspace/buz_customize_kanban/static/src/product_kanban.xml

Also check if there's a css directory under /workspace/buz_customize_kanban/static/src/css/ and remove it too.

Remove the entire /workspace/buz_customize_kanban/static/ directory if it becomes empty after removing those files.
